name: Apex
description: The flagship Bittensor subnet powering decentralized large language model inference. Miners compete to serve the highest-quality responses, scored by validators using a sophisticated ranking system.
howToMine: Deploy a high-performance GPU server running frontier LLMs such as LLaMA-3 70B or Mistral. Register your hotkey on SN1 via the Bittensor CLI, configure the miner template from the bittensor-subnet-1 repo, and maintain high uptime. Validators score responses on coherence, accuracy, and latency.

name: omron
description: Omron delivers decentralized AI inference with verifiable computation proofs, enabling trustless execution of neural network workloads on commodity hardware across a global peer network.
howToMine: Install the Omron miner package and connect a GPU with at least 24GB VRAM. Submit verified inference runs using the cryptographic proof framework and keep your node online for steady emissions. Higher throughput and proof quality earn larger reward multipliers.

name: templar
description: Templar powers distributed pre-training of large language models across thousands of nodes, featured on the All-In Podcast. Miners contribute gradient updates that collectively train foundation models at scale.
howToMine: Set up a node with at least one high-end GPU (RTX 4090 or A100 recommended) and install the Templar miner. Contribute gradient computations during distributed training rounds. Your reward scales with the quality and quantity of valid gradient contributions submitted per epoch.

name: Targon
description: Targon provides deterministic inference verification using cryptographic attestation, ensuring miner outputs are authentic and tamper-proof. It powers trustless AI API services across the Bittensor ecosystem.
howToMine: Register on Targon and deploy a GPU server running supported inference backends. Pass the validator benchmark suite by demonstrating deterministic outputs and low latency. Higher throughput earns proportionally larger emission shares.

name: OpenKaito
description: OpenKaito indexes and ranks Web3 and crypto content across Twitter, Discord, Telegram, and on-chain data. Miners crawl and score content quality to build a decentralized search index.
howToMine: Deploy the OpenKaito miner with access to social media APIs and configure crawling targets. Index quality is scored by validators on freshness, relevance, and deduplication. Consistent indexing of high-signal content maximizes your emission allocation.

name: Infinite Games
description: Nous Hermes subnet fine-tunes and serves aligned open-source language models at scale. Miners compete to produce the best fine-tuned variants of foundation models as scored by human-feedback validators.
howToMine: Fine-tune a capable base model using the Nous dataset protocol and register it on SN6. Validators score your model on a held-out benchmark suite testing instruction-following, truthfulness, and helpfulness. Top-ranked models earn the largest emission share.

name: SubVortex
description: Subvortex provides decentralized GPU compute infrastructure, routing workloads to verified miners worldwide. It serves as a backbone layer for compute-intensive tasks across the Bittensor network.
howToMine: Register a GPU node and run the Subvortex miner software. Your node will receive routed compute tasks, and you are rewarded based on throughput, reliability, and latency. Datacenter-grade hardware with guaranteed uptime earns maximum rewards.

name: Proprietary Trading Network
description: Taoshi's Proprietary Trading Network collects AI-generated trading signals for crypto markets. Miners submit predictions and signal strategies that are scored by live market performance.
howToMine: Develop a trading signal model and register it on SN8 via the Taoshi miner template. Submit trade signals for BTC, ETH, and other assets. Your returns are evaluated against live market data, and top performers by Sharpe ratio earn disproportionate emissions.

name: Pretrain
description: The Pretraining subnet incentivizes competitive training of base language models from scratch. Miners upload model checkpoints that validators evaluate on perplexity and downstream task performance.
howToMine: Train a language model from scratch using the subnet's dataset corpus and upload checkpoints to the validator-accessible endpoint. Models are ranked on validation perplexity. Access to multi-GPU clusters is strongly recommended for competitive training.

name: Sturdy
description: Sturdy Finance subnet optimizes yield strategies for DeFi lending protocols. Miners submit allocation strategies across pools, and the best risk-adjusted returns earn TAO emissions.
howToMine: Build and deploy a DeFi yield optimization model using Sturdy's allocation interface. Your strategy is benchmarked against live DeFi protocol data for risk-adjusted returns. Strong quantitative finance and on-chain analytics skills are required.

name: Dippy
description: Celium decentralizes GPU compute rental, connecting AI workload providers with miners offering verified hardware. It enables permissionless access to global GPU capacity at competitive rates.
howToMine: Register your GPUs on Celium and install the miner daemon. Your hardware specs, uptime, and job completion rate determine your emission score. High-VRAM GPUs and datacenter connectivity earn premium rewards.

name: Compute Horde
description: Horde aggregates open-source LLM inference across volunteer GPU nodes, providing a decentralized AI Horde compatible API layer. Miners serve model completions and are rewarded by throughput.
howToMine: Install the Horde-compatible miner and point it to an LLM backend (KoboldCPP, Aphrodite, etc.). Throughput in tokens-per-second and model diversity score determine your emissions. Consumer GPUs with 16GB VRAM can participate.

name: Data Universe
description: Dataverse creates a decentralized marketplace for high-quality AI training datasets. Miners curate, clean, and verify datasets while validators assess quality and uniqueness.
howToMine: Contribute curated datasets to the Dataverse registry. Validators assess quality metrics including deduplication ratio, annotation accuracy, and coverage breadth. Unique, high-signal data earns the most emissions.

name: Vector-Store
description: LLM Defender subnet builds decentralized adversarial defenses for large language models. Miners develop red-teaming pipelines and jailbreak detectors validated against emerging attack vectors.
howToMine: Develop LLM defense modules including prompt injection detectors and output classifiers. Submit your defenses to the validator pipeline and earn rewards proportional to detection accuracy on the evolving attack benchmark.

name: de_val
description: Blockchain Insights indexes on-chain data across multiple networks, producing structured analytics feeds. Miners run indexing nodes and submit data quality is scored by validators against reference datasets.
howToMine: Run an archive node for one or more supported blockchains and connect it to the Blockchain Insights indexer. Submit structured data extractions and earn rewards based on data freshness, completeness, and accuracy.

name: BitAds
description: BitAds powers decentralized digital advertising attribution, verifying ad impressions and click-through rates on-chain. Miners run attribution nodes and validators audit traffic quality.
howToMine: Deploy a BitAds attribution node and connect it to publisher endpoints. Traffic quality is measured by fraud detection scoring. Verified high-quality traffic flows earn proportional TAO emissions.

name: 404—GEN
description: SN17 generates 3D assets and environments from text and image prompts using decentralized AI. Miners run 3D synthesis models and compete on quality metrics for mesh fidelity and prompt adherence.
howToMine: Deploy a 3D generation model (e.g., Shap-E, One-2-3-45) on a GPU node and register on SN17. Validators score your 3D outputs on geometric quality and prompt consistency. High-VRAM GPUs are required for competitive quality.

name: Zeus
description: Cortex.t provides a unified decentralized API gateway for AI inference, routing requests to specialized miners across text, image, and embedding tasks. It powers external developer integrations.
howToMine: Register as a Cortex.t provider and deploy inference endpoints for supported modalities. Your API response quality, latency, and uptime are continuously scored. Serving multiple modalities expands your emission share.

name: Nineteen.ai
description: Vision subnet incentivizes decentralized image understanding and classification tasks. Miners run computer vision models and are scored on accuracy across a diverse benchmark of visual tasks.
howToMine: Deploy state-of-the-art vision models (ViT, DINO, SAM) on a GPU node. Register on SN19 and respond to validator classification and detection challenges. Model accuracy and inference speed jointly determine your reward.

name: BitAgent - Rizzo
description: BitAgent coordinates autonomous AI agents across the Bittensor network. Miners deploy task-solving agents that validators evaluate on multi-step reasoning, tool use, and goal completion.
howToMine: Build an autonomous agent using frameworks like AutoGPT or LangChain and register on SN20. Your agent is tasked with complex goal-directed problems. Performance on benchmark tasks determines your emission share.

name: OMEGA Any-to-Any
description: FileTAO provides decentralized file storage with cryptographic proof-of-storage, offering a TAO-incentivized alternative to centralized cloud storage for AI artifacts and datasets.
howToMine: Provide hard disk storage capacity and run the FileTAO miner daemon. Validators issue periodic storage challenges that you must answer cryptographically. More storage capacity and high reliability earns proportionally more emissions.

name: Desearch
description: Meta Search builds a decentralized search index for the open web. Miners crawl and rank web pages using AI relevance scoring, competing to provide the best results for validator queries.
howToMine: Run a web crawler with AI-powered relevance ranking and connect it to the Meta Search subnet. Validator queries test result freshness and relevance. A scalable crawling infrastructure and strong NLP pipeline are key to high scores.

name: Zuvu
description: NicheImage specializes in high-quality niche image generation covering art styles, photography, and domain-specific visuals. Miners serve Stable Diffusion and custom-tuned model completions.
howToMine: Deploy Stable Diffusion or fine-tuned image generation models on a GPU node with at least 16GB VRAM. Connect to SN23 and respond to generation requests. Image quality is scored by CLIP similarity and human-preference metrics.

name: OMEGA Labs
description: Omega Labs collects and curates multimodal training data including video, audio, and text pairs. Miners gather diverse internet-scale data and validators score quality and uniqueness.
howToMine: Build scrapers for video and multimodal content using the Omega Labs data protocol. Submit data batches to the validator scoring pipeline. Data uniqueness, metadata quality, and content diversity are the key scoring factors.

name: Folding
description: Hivemind enables collaborative distributed training with gradient sharing across a swarm of nodes. Miners contribute compute to jointly train foundation models using the Hivemind optimizer protocol.
howToMine: Join the Hivemind swarm by running a peer node with at least one GPU. Your node participates in synchronous gradient averaging rounds. Higher GPU throughput and stable connectivity earn proportionally larger emission shares.

name: Storb
description: Tensor Alchemy provides decentralized AI image generation with an emphasis on artistic and creative outputs. Miners serve high-fidelity image generations ranked by aesthetic quality.
howToMine: Deploy high-quality image generation models including SDXL or Flux. Validators score outputs on aesthetic quality, prompt adherence, and resolution. Fine-tuned models with distinctive artistic styles can outperform generic base models.

name: NI Compute
description: SN27 is a general-purpose compute subnet matching AI workload providers with GPU miners. It supports a wide range of ML inference and training tasks through a standardized job protocol.
howToMine: Register your GPU hardware on SN27 and run the compute miner daemon. Accept compute jobs dispatched by the scheduler. Performance metrics include job throughput, latency, and reliability. Enterprise-grade hardware earns maximum rewards.

name: Unknown
description: Foundry provides decentralized price oracles for traditional financial assets including the S&P500, commodities, and FX pairs. Miners submit price feeds validated against consensus.
howToMine: Connect to financial data APIs and deploy the Foundry oracle miner. Submit price feeds for tracked assets. Your reward is proportional to accuracy vs. the consensus price and update frequency. Low-latency data access is essential.

name: Coldint
description: Coldint specializes in cold-start language model training, bootstrapping new models from synthetic and curated data. Miners compete to produce models that generalize well on held-out evaluations.
howToMine: Train small-to-medium language models on the Coldint dataset specification and submit checkpoints. Validators evaluate on a hidden benchmark. Efficiency in parameter count versus performance earns bonus scoring.

name: Bettensor
description: Bittensor Swarms orchestrates multi-agent systems where specialized AI agents collaborate on complex tasks. Miners deploy agent microservices that coordinate to solve multi-step problems.
howToMine: Build specialized agent modules compatible with the Swarms orchestration protocol. Register on SN30 and participate in multi-agent task pipelines. Your module's contribution quality and reliability in collaborative tasks determines your emission.

name: NullUntilBoot
description: NAS Chain performs neural architecture search on the Bittensor network, discovering efficient model architectures through decentralized evolutionary algorithms.
howToMine: Implement NAS algorithms compatible with the NAS Chain protocol and register a miner node. Submit discovered architectures evaluated on benchmark tasks. Novel, efficient architectures earn the highest rewards.

name: ItsAI
description: It AI develops autonomous task automation agents for enterprise workflows. Miners deploy agents that handle customer service, data entry, and process automation evaluated on real task benchmarks.
howToMine: Build enterprise automation agents using the It AI task specification. Register on SN32 and demonstrate reliable task completion across workflow benchmarks. Agents with high success rates on novel tasks earn more emissions.

name: ReadyAI
description: Ready AI focuses on video generation and editing using decentralized AI compute. Miners serve text-to-video and video enhancement requests evaluated on quality and coherence.
howToMine: Deploy video generation models (e.g., AnimateDiff, Wan) on high-VRAM GPU nodes. Respond to validator video generation challenges. Quality is scored on temporal coherence, prompt adherence, and resolution. A100-class GPUs are required.

name: BitMind
description: BitMind detects and classifies AI-generated content, building decentralized deepfake detection infrastructure. Miners develop classifiers that validators test against novel synthetic media.
howToMine: Train deepfake detection models using the BitMind benchmark dataset. Register on SN34 and submit your detector. Validators test it against a continuously updated adversarial test set. Higher detection accuracy on novel attacks earns more emissions.

name: LogicNet
description: Logic Net specializes in logical reasoning and mathematical problem-solving capabilities for AI models. Miners serve specialized reasoning models evaluated on formal logic and math benchmarks.
howToMine: Fine-tune or prompt-engineer a reasoning model capable of solving formal logic and mathematical problems. Register on SN35 and compete on the validator reasoning benchmark. Chain-of-thought quality and accuracy are primary scoring factors.

name: web-agents
description: Human Intelligence coordinates human annotators in a decentralized labeling marketplace. Miners (human workers) complete labeling tasks and are rewarded for quality and speed.
howToMine: Register as a human labeler on SN36 and complete annotation tasks. Your accuracy is verified against gold-standard labels and inter-annotator agreement. High-quality consistent annotations earn the most TAO.

name: Finetuning
description: FHE.org builds privacy-preserving AI inference using Fully Homomorphic Encryption. Miners provide FHE compute capacity, enabling encrypted model inference without data exposure.
howToMine: Deploy FHE-capable compute nodes with high memory bandwidth. Install the FHE.org miner and process encrypted inference requests. FHE operations are memory-intensive; server-grade CPUs with large RAM are required.

name: Distributed Training
description: SN38 enables large-scale distributed model training using data parallelism across globally distributed miners. It complements SN3 by focusing on different training paradigms and model architectures.
howToMine: Register a GPU node and join the distributed training pool. Your reward scales with valid gradient contributions per training round. High-bandwidth GPU interconnects improve performance significantly.

name: w.ai (Parked)
description: EdgeMaxxing optimizes and benchmarks AI models for edge deployment. Miners run model compression and quantization pipelines producing efficient models validated on edge hardware metrics.
howToMine: Develop model optimization pipelines including quantization, pruning, and distillation. Submit optimized models to the benchmark suite targeting ONNX and TFLite runtimes. Models achieving the best accuracy/latency tradeoff earn the most emissions.

name: Chunking
description: Chunking provides decentralized text chunking and embedding services for RAG pipelines. Miners process documents into optimal chunks and generate embeddings scored on retrieval quality.
howToMine: Deploy an embedding and chunking pipeline using models like BGE or E5. Register on SN40 and process validator document batches. Chunking quality is scored by retrieval accuracy on a held-out QA benchmark.

name: SPORTSTENSOR
description: Sport Prediction builds decentralized sports outcome forecasting models. Miners submit probability distributions for game outcomes evaluated against actual results over rolling time windows.
howToMine: Develop statistical or ML-based sports prediction models and register on SN41. Submit probability forecasts for upcoming fixtures. Your Brier score on resolved predictions determines your emission share. Access to historical sports data is essential.

name: Real-Time Data by Masa
description: Score Predict specializes in exact-score prediction for sports and events. Miners compete to generate precise outcome distributions rather than binary win/loss predictions.
howToMine: Build probabilistic score prediction models and register on SN42. Submit detailed outcome distributions and earn rewards proportional to log-likelihood on resolved events. Granular match data and Poisson-based models are commonly used.

name: Graphite
description: Text2Image subnet runs a decentralized text-to-image generation market. Miners serve high-quality image synthesis from natural language prompts, competing on aesthetic scores and CLIP alignment.
howToMine: Deploy SDXL, Flux, or Midjourney-equivalent models on GPU nodes with 24GB+ VRAM. Connect to SN43 and respond to generation challenges. Images are scored by CLIP similarity, FID, and human aesthetic preference.

name: Score
description: Dojo collects human preference data for RLHF training at scale. Miners coordinate human raters to produce comparison data that trains reward models for future LLM alignment.
howToMine: Operate a preference data collection pipeline through the Dojo interface. Recruit quality annotators and implement quality control to ensure consistent preference labels. Data quality and volume both factor into your emission allocation.

name: SWE - Rizzo
description: Gen42 focuses on generating synthetic training data for computer vision tasks. Miners produce diverse, annotated synthetic images that validators assess for realism and annotation quality.
howToMine: Deploy 3D rendering or generative model pipelines to produce labeled synthetic images. Register on SN45 and submit batches. Validators assess domain coverage, annotation accuracy, and visual diversity. Procedural generation pipelines scale well.

name: Neural3D
description: Nakamoto subnet implements advanced consensus mechanisms and cryptoeconomic experiments inspired by Bitcoin's Nakamoto consensus. Miners validate novel protocol designs.
howToMine: Implement consensus protocol clients compatible with the Nakamoto subnet specification. Register and participate in consensus validation rounds. Protocol correctness and latency are primary scoring metrics.

name: Condenses.ai
description: Condense AI builds decentralized document summarization and information compression services. Miners compete to produce the most informative summaries evaluated on coverage and faithfulness.
howToMine: Deploy a document summarization system using LLMs or extractive methods. Register on SN47 and process validator document batches. Summary quality is scored on ROUGE metrics and human factuality evaluations.

name: NextPlace
description: NextPlace builds AI-powered real estate valuation models using decentralized property data. Miners submit property price predictions validated against actual transaction records.
howToMine: Build real estate valuation models using the NextPlace property dataset. Register on SN48 and submit price predictions for queried properties. Models are scored by RMSE on verified sale prices. Integration with geospatial data improves accuracy.

name: polaris
description: AutoML automates machine learning pipeline design through decentralized hyperparameter search and architecture optimization. Miners run AutoML trials and submit best-performing configurations.
howToMine: Implement AutoML search algorithms including Bayesian optimization or evolutionary search. Register on SN49 and run trials on the benchmark tasks. Best trial accuracy vs. compute budget earns emission rewards.

name: Synth
description: Contradiction subnet trains and evaluates models for natural language inference and contradiction detection. Miners fine-tune NLI models evaluated on entailment benchmarks.
howToMine: Fine-tune NLI classification models on the Contradiction benchmark dataset. Submit models to SN50 validators who evaluate entailment, contradiction, and neutral classification accuracy. Multi-genre NLI data improves generalization.

name: Celium
description: lium.io provides decentralized LLM inference for external API consumers. Miners serve high-performance inference endpoints with competitive latency, forming a marketplace for AI API access.
howToMine: Deploy a high-performance LLM serving stack (vLLM, TGI, or equivalent) and register on SN51. Serve API requests routed by validators. Throughput in tokens/second and p95 latency determine your emission score.

name: Dojo
description: An early-stage Bittensor subnet. Details are pending community documentation.
howToMine: Refer to the official Bittensor documentation and the subnet's GitHub repository for miner setup instructions.

name: Chutes
description: Chutes by Manifold Labs is a decentralized AI compute marketplace with massive validator stake. Despite current 0% emission, it holds one of the largest stake pools, signaling potential for future high rewards.
howToMine: Register GPU compute capacity on Chutes and install the Manifold Labs miner daemon. Emission rates may change in future governance cycles. The large stake pool makes this subnet worth monitoring closely for emission announcements.

name: Tensor Private Network (TPN)
description: An early-stage Bittensor subnet. Details are pending community documentation.

name: NOVA
description: One of the highest-emission Bittensor subnets at ~4.3%. This compute-focused subnet allocates the largest share of daily TAO emissions among all active subnets, attracting significant miner interest.
howToMine: Register on SN68 and provide GPU compute resources per the subnet miner specification. Given the high emission rate, competition is intense. Monitor the official subnet GitHub for the latest miner software and scoring criteria.

description: SN75 is a high-emission inference subnet capturing ~1.4% of total TAO daily emissions. It provides specialized AI inference services with a growing miner community.
howToMine: Register on SN75 and deploy inference infrastructure per the subnet miner specification. The high emission rate draws competitive miners. Check the official subnet repo for hardware requirements and scoring methodology.

description: SN81 is a high-emission training subnet at ~3.4% of total TAO daily emissions, attracting significant GPU compute resources for large-scale model training tasks.
howToMine: Register on SN81 and contribute GPU compute for training workloads per the subnet specification. Given the high emission rate, competition requires high-performance GPUs. Monitor the subnet repo for the latest scoring and task updates.

howToMine: Register on SN85 and deploy language model infrastructure per the subnet miner specification. The competitive emission rate attracts skilled LLM miners. Review the subnet documentation for scoring methodology and benchmark details.

name: affine
description: SN120 is a high-emission data subnet at ~1.7% of total TAO daily emissions, building a decentralized data infrastructure layer for AI training pipelines.
howToMine: Register on SN120 and contribute to the data pipeline per the subnet specification. The competitive emission pool rewards high-quality, unique data contributions. Review the subnet repository for current data format requirements and scoring.
